name: agent-workflow
description: Repo-backed phase/task workflow commands for agentic coding sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Durable phase/task workflow commands for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Agent Workflow gives coding agents repo-backed memory through status files, phase task lists, handoffs, and context-boundary prompts. It is command-first and avoids automatic commits, stashes, hooks, or status mutation unless explicitly invoked.
defaultPrompt: Initialize the agent workflow in this project.
Check whether this is a context boundary.
